name: Grated Carrot Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble and attach rotor slicer/shredder using coarse shredder cone (No 2).
2. Turn to speed 4 and shred carrots.
3. Combine carrots, rice, onion, salt, pepper, and water in a large saucepan.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat; cover and simmer for 25 minutes.
5. Exchange the coarse shredder cone for fine shredder cone (No 1).
6. Turn to speed 4 and shred cheese.
7. Combine cheese, milk, eggs, and nutmeg and pour over carrot and rice mixture; mix well.
8. Place in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish and bake at 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes.
9. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6-8 servings
